narrative: Strait of Hormuz closure and hot US CPI expectations drive a geopolitical risk premium and USD bid — WTI surges toward $102.54 as equities slide; USD/JPY firms to 157.67 on 300bp Fed-BoJ carry despite intervention doubts. Gold lower -1.04% near $4,679; equities -0.83%; DXY +0.42%; VIX 18.9. Watch US CPI data at 12:30 UTC for Fed rate-cut repricing.
